movie.actors: Robert Englund, Ken Kirzinger, Monica Keena, Jason Ritter
movie.plot: Freddy Krueger and Jason Voorhees return to terrorize the teenage population. Except this time, they're out to get each other, too.
movie.title: Freddy vs. Jason
movie.writer: Wes Craven (characters), Victor Miller (characters), Damian Shannon, Mark Swift
